$comment: Placeholder fixture for Phase 1.6 exemplar UC; replace with production-grade sample-data as part of Phase 4.5 sandbox validation.
description: Fixture exercising positive scenario for 22.39.3: When an Art.34 / §164.404 campaign is open and fewer than 95% of in-scope data subjects have a confirmed delivery or bounced-and-retried event 50 days after classification, the UC fires.
